portfolio.note: July 1 MID-MORNING (11:09 AM ET / 15:09Z). TRADING DAY. API BLOCKED (HTTP 403 — 60th+ consecutive session). JUNE 30 COMPLETE BLACKOUT. July 1 Pre-Market + Market-Open SILENTLY FAILED. MU RE-SCORED 6.5 (DRAM antitrust lawsuit) — REJECTED. META NEW APPROVED 7.5 (cloud compute Bloomberg). ISM PMI 53.3% expansion. SPX -0.35% Q2 digestion. OPERATOR URGENT: (1) SELL 9sh AMD NOW + GTC stop $481.42 + GTC target $607; (2) BUY 3sh IBM limit bracket $274; (3) BUY 8sh META limit bracket $615.

positions.note: CRITICALLY NAKED — Day 10. 18sh at $506.76 fill, now ~$575. Unrealized +$1,228 (+12.4%). Take-profit target $582.78 only 1.4% away. AMD 'Advancing AI 2026' event July 23; MI450 Q3 ramp. Technical breakout targeting $607. Position = ~10.2% equity (OVER 5% hard cap). OPERATOR: (1) SELL 9sh at market NOW; (2) GTC stop $481.42 + GTC target $607 on remaining 9sh. API BLOCKED — agent cannot execute.

RE-SCORED 6.5 (was 7.5). REJECTED. DRAM antitrust class-action (Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron, June 25 filing) + MU -6.5% today ($1,154 → $1,058) on H2 profit-taking. Fundamentals intact (HBM4 sold out) but antitrust overhang reduces conviction. Wait for technical stabilization before re-entry. NOT ENTERING.

Carry-forward from June 29 7.0 commitment. Re-scored 6.67 (only market-level Technical/Sentiment drag). Order attempted: 3sh limit $274.37 bracket GTC (stop $260.65, target $315.53) → HTTP 403 BLOCKED. IBM earnings window opens ~July 20 — must exit before. OPERATOR: BUY 3sh IBM limit $274, stop $260.65, target $315.53, order_class=bracket, tif=gtc.

NEW APPROVED 7.5 (F=9 T=6 S=9 M=7 R=6 TA=8). Bloomberg: Meta launching cloud compute service. +7.56% gap-up on major company-specific catalyst. Order attempted: 8sh limit $615.06 bracket GTC (stop $584.31, target $707.31) → HTTP 403 BLOCKED. OPERATOR: BUY 8sh META limit $615, stop $584.31, target $707.31, order_class=bracket, tif=gtc.
